title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a news roundup covering major AI releases including multi-agent systems, video generation models, and LLMs. Featured announcements span robotics (Happy Horse), vision-language models (SenseNova U1), agent frameworks (recursive multi-agents), and video generation (Vista 4D, Talkie). The episode consolidates updates from Anthropic, xAI, Mistral, NVIDIA, and other AI labs.
